activities_projects.title: Local Market Globalisation Survey
activities_projects.objective: To analyze the presence and impact of global products in the local market.
steps: Survey at least 20 shops to identify Indian and foreign brands.
Classify products by country of origin and price range.
Prepare a report analyzing consumer preference and market trends.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the practical impact of globalisation on local markets.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess survey design, data accuracy, and depth of analysis.

activities_projects.title: MNC Case Study Research
activities_projects.objective: To critically analyze the operations and impact of a multinational company in India.
steps: Select one MNC operating in India.
Research its investment, employment generation, and supply chain.
Prepare a presentation highlighting benefits and challenges.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students evaluate economic and social effects of MNCs.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate research quality, clarity of presentation, and balanced viewpoint.

activities_projects.title: Export-Import Data Analysis Project
activities_projects.objective: To examine India’s trade patterns using real data.
activities_projects.materials: Internet data sources, graph paper, calculator
steps: Collect latest export and import data of India.
Create charts comparing major trade partners and goods.
Analyze trade balance and suggest improvements.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop skills in interpreting trade data.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess data accuracy, graphical representation, and logical conclusions.

activities_projects.title: Small Producers vs Global Competition Study
activities_projects.objective: To analyze challenges faced by small-scale producers due to globalisation.
steps: Interview a local small business owner.
Identify challenges due to foreign competition.
Suggest strategies to improve competitiveness.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic pressures on local producers.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate quality of interview, analysis, and practicality of suggestions.

activities_projects.title: WTO Policy Impact Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To examine the influence of WTO on Indian trade policies.
steps: Research WTO agreements affecting India.
Analyze one agreement and its impact on farmers or industries.
Prepare a structured report.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand global trade governance and its effects.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess depth of research and analytical clarity.

activities_projects.title: Global Supply Chain Mapping
activities_projects.objective: To trace the global production network of a product.
steps: Select a product like a smartphone or car.
Identify countries involved in raw materials, manufacturing, and assembly.
Draw a supply chain map and explain interconnections.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check accuracy of mapping and explanation.

activities_projects.title: Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: To analyze the impact of FDI in a specific sector.
steps: Choose a sector such as telecom or automobile.
Research foreign investments and job creation data.
Analyze positive and negative effects.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic impact of foreign investment.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate research accuracy and analytical depth.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Rights in a Globalised Market
activities_projects.objective: To study consumer protection in global markets.
steps: Research consumer protection laws in India.
Analyze challenges faced by consumers due to global brands.
Prepare an awareness report.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand consumer rights and responsibilities.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess clarity, relevance, and research support.

activities_projects.title: Digital Globalisation Documentary
activities_projects.objective: To creatively present the role of technology in globalisation.
steps: Research examples like IT services and e-commerce.
Record short interviews or examples from local users.
Create a 5–7 minute documentary explaining digital globalisation.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect technology with global economic integration.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess creativity, factual accuracy, and clarity of message.

activities_projects.title: Globalisation 2040 Vision Report
activities_projects.objective: To design a future strategy for India in a globalised economy.
steps: Identify current challenges in trade, employment, and environment.
Propose innovative strategies for sustainable global integration.
Present a structured vision document with justification.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop strategic thinking and policy awareness.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate feasibility, research depth, and presentation quality.
